query:
UPDATE episodes SET videoUrl = CASE 
  WHEN id = 30001 THEN 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30002 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/bipbop_16x9/bipbop_16x9_variant.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30003 THEN 'https://cdn.jwplayer.com/manifests/pZxWPRg4.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30004 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_ts/master.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30005 THEN 'https://demo.unified-streaming.com/k8s/features/stable/video/tears-of-steel/tears-of-steel.ism/.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30006 THEN 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30007 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/bipbop_16x9/bipbop_16x9_variant.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30008 THEN 'https://cdn.jwplayer.com/manifests/pZxWPRg4.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30009 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_ts/master.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30010 THEN 'https://demo.unified-streaming.com/k8s/features/stable/video/tears-of-steel/tears-of-steel.ism/.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30011 THEN 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30012 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/bipbop_16x9/bipbop_16x9_variant.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30013 THEN 'https://cdn.jwplayer.com/manifests/pZxWPRg4.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30014 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_ts/master.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30015 THEN 'https://demo.unified-streaming.com/k8s/features/stable/video/tears-of-steel/tears-of-steel.ism/.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30016 THEN 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30017 THEN 'https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/bipbop_16x9/bipbop_16x9_variant.m3u8'
  WHEN id = 30018 THEN 'https://cdn.jwplayer.com/manifests/pZxWPRg4.m3u8'
  ELSE videoUrl
END
WHERE id BETWEEN 30001 AND 30018
